feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Work Package Blocked Functions field - Standard CDS View
entry.content:
Need to add the field "Work Package Blocked Functions" (which is at the Work Package level) in custom CDS view. Is there any standard CDS view release with this field?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Restrict users from editing projects in the Plan Customer/Internal Projects apps.
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We're facing an issue with editing Projects in Create Internal/Customer Projects App,

Users who are assigned to a project manager Role are able to do it but we would like to disable editing privileges.

Could you please point out a restriction that is responsible for this? 

 

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue with UploadSetwithTable - Unsupported Media Type (415) in RAP (S/4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am working on a RAP-based application in S/4HANA Public Cloud where I need to attach multiple files and upload them using the UploadSetwithTable control.

However, I am encountering the following error during upload:

Error Response:

{
"message": "The server is refusing to process the request because the entity has an unsupported format"
}

HTTP Status: 415 (Unsupported Media Type)

Implementation Details:-

My Fragment code: 

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:f="sap.f" xmlns:upload="sap.m.upload">
   
    <Dialog id="uploadDialog" title="Upload File" draggable="true" resizable="true" contentWidth="50%" contentHeight="50%">
        <content>
            <Table id="table-uploadSet"
                inset="true"
                autoPopinMode="true"
                hiddenInPopin="None"
                items="{path: 'attachmentModel>/Attachment', templateShareable: false}">
                <headerToolbar>
                    <OverflowToolbar>
                        <Title text="Documents" level="H2" />
                        <ToolbarSpacer />
                        <ToolbarSeparator />
                        <upload:ActionsPlaceholder id="uploadButton" placeholderFor="UploadButtonPlaceholder" />
                    </OverflowToolbar>
                </headerToolbar>

                <dependents>
                    <plugins.UploadSetwithTable
                        id="uploadSet"
                        uploadUrl="/path"
                        multiple="true"
                        beforeUploadStarts=".onBeforeUploadStarts"
                        uploadCompleted=".onUploadCompleted"
                        cloudFilePickerEnabled="true"
                        actions="uploadButton">
                        <rowConfiguration>
                            <upload.UploadItemConfiguration
                                fileNamePath="Filename"
                                mediaTypePath="Mimetype"
                                urlPath="url"
                                previewablePath="previewable"
                                fileSizePath="fileSize"
                                isTrustedSourcePath="trustedSource"/>
                        </rowConfiguration>
                    </plugins.UploadSetwithTable>
                </dependents>

                <columns>
                    <Column id="fileName" importance="High">
                        <header>
                            <Label text="File Name" />
                        </header>
                    </Column>
                    <Column id="actionButton" importance="High" />
                </columns>  

                <items>
                    <ColumnListItem>
                        <cells>
                            <Text text="{attachmentModel>Filename}" />
                            <Button type="Transparent" icon="sap-icon://decline" press="onRemoveHandler"/>
                        </cells>
                    </ColumnListItem>
                </items>
            </Table>
        </content>
        <endButton>
            <Button text="Close" type="Transparent" press="onCloseFileUploadDialog"/>
        </endButton>
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

Controller code: 

onBeforeUploadStarts: function (oEvent) {
            var oUploadSet = oEvent.getSource();           
            var oItem = oEvent.getParameter("item"); // Get the item inside mParameters

            var oModel = this.getView().getModel("zmm_sd_pr_atch");
            var csrfToken = oModel.getHttpHeaders()["X-CSRF-Token"];
 
            var sContentType = oItem.getMediaType() || "application/octet-stream";
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "x-csrf-token", text: csrfToken })
            );
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "slug", text: oItem.getFileName() })
            );
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "Content-Type", text: sContentType  })
            );
},
onUploadCompleted: function (oEvent) {
            var iResponseStatus = oEvent.getParameter("status");
       
            if (iResponseStatus === 201) {  // Check if upload is successful
                this.getView().getModel("zmm_sd_pr_atch").refresh(true);
                MessageToast.show("Document Added Successfully");
            } else {
                MessageToast.show("File upload failed.");
            }
        },
 

Any guidance on proper request formatting would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: EORI number into eDocument
entry.content:
Dear All,

we are working for italian customer and it needs to fill the EORI number into xml tag <CodEORI> 1.2.1.3.5.

Please, could you suggest me how to insert this code for each comapny code?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Document and Reporting Compliance 

Thanks and regards

entry.title: SAP S/4 Public Cloud - Post Incoming Payment Integration
entry.content:
Dear All

We have generated 1000s of bills by integrating POS with SAP SD Module. Now there is a requirement to post incoming payments against billing in the background either using Business Object Interface or by calling API.

Within api.sap.com, we are getting only below options

  1. SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Customer Payments API ( To use these APIs, you must have the licensing for the product SAP S4/HANA Cloud for customer payments ). 
  2. Business Object Interface - I_JOURNALENTRYTP

Both of the options are not looking feasible to post and clear incoming payments of bills generated against delivery documents within SD Module..

Is there any alternate to automate the incoming payments within SAP Public Cloud by using Billing Documents generated within SAP Public Cloud - SD Module.

entry.title: Conditionally send a standard event from SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Cloud to BTP Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am exploring the event mesh functionality on BTP Cloud Integration Suite. My scenarios is when a sales order item delivery date is changed, I need to send an event to BTP Event Mesh. I know standard event topic 'sap/s4/beh/salesorder/v1/SalesOrder/ItemChanged/v1' is available but it is sent for any change on sales order item. I think this cannot be achieved with mere filtering by any properties.

Is there any way I can influence the event publish from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to send only in case of change to delivery date if sales order item?

If not, the event consumer has to call s/4hana cloud api to get the sales order detail. In this case how can we know that delivery date has changed and not any other fields?

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: SAP Public cloud integration with third-party MES -handling units
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am looing for information on S4HPC integration with third party MES system, I found below scope ID's are relevant and flows only shows process order to MES and confirmation back to S4HPC. we have EWM so I would like to know how the handling units are created and post goods receipt for process order happens and for consumption do we use process order confirmation API or is there any other interface.

 

Scope ID 3W3,3W4,IY5.

entry.title: Deploy SAP Fiori App on S/4 HANA Public Cloud with SAP Business Application Studio (BAS)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

@julieplummer20 @ariannamussobarcucci 

I am facing a weird problem when trying to deploy SAP Fiori app through SAP business application studio on S/4 HANA public cloud development tenant (080).  I am following the below tutorial but getting the error on Step 5 during the deployment.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-s4hanacloud-procurement-purchasereq-shop-ui.html

I have developed RAP application in Eclipse IDE and have connected SAP BTP and S/4 HANA cloud application to deploy the application. App has built successfully but when trying to deploy same, getting the below error.

error builder:custom deploy-to-abap Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'bind').
Please help me to understand the error and the steps to resolve the same.

Thank you in advance!

Thanks.

entry.title: Could you please tell me how to register an order slip and how to process it afterwards when direct
entry.content:
Could you please tell me how to register an order slip and how to process it afterwards when direct shipping to the supplier is done at the time of ordering, rather than starting from an order receipt?
I understand that BDK and BD3 Scope Items are applicable when ordering.
I would be grateful if you could provide me with Scope Items and materials that describe direct shipping to the supplier when ordering.

entry.title: Cost Center mass changes / custom field mass changes in Public cloud
entry.content:
Business wants to make Mass changes to certain fields in cost center master data.
Currently, the only way possible that we are aware is to manually open each cost center and change the required fields. 
This is very time consuming and inefficient if there are hundreds and thousands of cost centers.
 
For example, there is a custom field: Finance Prime
Business wants to change the names of the Finance primes (mass changes to several cost centers)
Or if this can be achieved via BTP?

entry.title: Joule Setup / Error during Booster Execution
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
we have tried to integrate Joule with our TDD System using the End-to-End Setup Guide (Joule – End-to-End Setup Guide (for all Line of Bu... - SAP Community). For context the joule entitlement is in one subaccount and the workzone entitlements are in a different subaccount but under the same global account. Everything else was setup identical to the guide.

During the execution of the booster we encountered the following error:


or as text:
[SaaS Subscription/(module.joule_subscription.cis_saas_subscription.saas_subscription[0])] The subscription of subaccount (name of subaccount) to application das-application and plan foundation, failed with state: SUBSCRIBE_FAILED. - Error Message: 'Async callback of reuse service  'Document Grounding'  with appName document-grounding failed. It failed its asynchronous callback and responded with message: Service Document Grounding with appName document-grounding did not send its async callback response within the maximum allowed timeout of 300000 milliseconds. To resolve the issue, please contact this service's owner. (Root Application : Joule appName: das-application-ias. Please open support case using the component: CA-JOULE.)'. App Error: ''. 

Can anyone point us to what the issue might be and how to resolve it ?

Best regards 
Lukas

entry.title: After 'delivery completed' is set we can still post a Goods receipt
entry.content:
After posting a goods receipt for a partial Qty against a purchase order item and setting a delivery complete flag 
in the PO item. We find it is still possible to post a goods receipt even if the delivery complete flag is set in the PO item ? 

 

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to get latest records from I_GOODSMOVEMENTCUBE CDS View based on Posting Date
entry.content:
Dear community,

We need a report of material aging, for that we need some material documents with latest posting dates for each material, Can I know how to do this in Custom CDS View?

how to sort in descending order and take top 1 in custom cds view app?

entry.title: Mass deletion of alternative Units of Measure
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am trying to mass delete Alternative Units of Measure from the product master data in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using the "Manage Mass Maintenance" app. I have included "D", in the "_ACTION_CODE" field in my upload file, and made sure I wasn't deleting the base unit of measure, but I received the following error:

"Deletion not allowed for 'Dimensions' (MARM) or one of its children."

 Is there any workaround to delete an Alternative UOM in mass? 

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks!

entry.title: Mass creation & upload freight agreements b SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

For a project with transportation management I'm looking for a way to upload freight agreements including rate tebles into SAP Public cloud.

I've looked into the migration cockpit, but there is no object at the moment.

I couldn't find an app either.

How can we achieve this?  There are too many records to manually enter them in the system.

Also for the future, they will require mass maintenance functionality.

thx.

Kind rgrds,

Bart

entry.title: Post Adjustment to GR/IR G/L account
entry.content:
How to post Currency Adjustment to a GR/IR Account?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Email Template - TotalGrossAmount value NOT in available variables
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to create a email template to be used when a billing document is sent by email to our customer.

This template has a bunch of variables that can be used in the template like the date of the billing document, etc.

Among those fields you can find {{TotalNetAmount}} and {{TotalTaxAmount}}, but you the TotalGrossAmount is not available as a variable while this field is one of hte most important of a billing document as it is the amount to be paid...

Does someone knows how it can be added ?

Thank you very much for your help 🙂

entry.title: Mass upload basic data text
entry.content:
Hi!

Does anyone know how can I mass upload basic text in the notes tab? I tried using MARA_STXL - Basic Data. Text but it can only update notes that is already in but not add new ones.

entry.title: 在进行物料成本估算时，是否能只按天或者日期进行选择物料，只估算没有进行成本估算的物料，如何处理？
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition 财务#在进行物料成本估算时，是否能只按天或者日期进行选择物料，只估算没有进行成本估算的物料，如何处理？因为物料太多，需每天进行物料成本的估算，能否只跑未进行成本估算的物料，而不所有物料都重新进行成本估算，如何处理？感谢

entry.title: Unable to activate the Goods Receipt Confirmations Communication Scenario in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: We are trying to access the Goods Receipt Confirmations Standard API from the SAP Business Accelerator Hub for S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, the required Communication Scenario (SAP_COM_0782) is not available for activation in the public cloud.
